challenge.title: Korak 56
challenge.description: Ispod vašeg poslednjeg p elementa, dodajte još jedan p element sa tekstom Total Carbohydrate 37g 13%. Kao i pre, koristite span elemente da učinite tekst Total Carbohydrate i 13% podebljanim. Zatim, obuhvatite hranljivostinost i količinu u span za ponovno poravnanje.

challengeFiles.name: index

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new p element at the end of your .daily-value element.
Your new p element should have the text Total Carbohydrate 37g 13%.
Your new p element should have three span elements.
One span element should wrap the text Total Carbohydrate 37g.
One span element should wrap the text Total Carbohydrate.
The span element around Total Carbohydrate should have the class attribute set to bold.
The span element around 13% should have the class attribute set to bold.
Your second span element should wrap the text 13%.

Total Carbohydrate 37g 13%

Dietary Fiber 4g

Total Sugars 12g

Includes 10g Added Sugars 20%

Protein 3g

Vitamin D 2mcg 10%

Calcium 260mg 20%

Iron 8mg 45%

Potassium 235mg 6%

* The % Daily Value (DV) tells you how much a nutrient in a serving of food contributes to a daily diet. 2,000 calories a day is used for general nutrition advice.
